_description: DM-R-10 — expected row counts per seed profile. scripts/verify-seed.cjs asserts real counts match these after a seed run. Update when seed data changes intentionally.
_rules: Only tables with deterministic counts are listed. Integration tests that add rows can drift counts — those tables are NOT listed. Add entries only after running the seed fresh and capturing the number.

it-company._origin: docker compose exec -e SEED_PROFILE=it-company backend sh -c 'npx ts-node --project tsconfig.json prisma/seed.ts'
